pages.title: Tiberium Crystal
pages.text: Dropped by Tiberium Ore in the Nether. Melts at 72 mb — roughly half an ingot. Crystalline, glassy texture; used in alloys and as a direct Tinkers' material.

pages.title: Dilithium Crystal
pages.text: Dropped by Dilithium Ore in the Overworld. Same 72 mb melt. Blue-white and luminous. Higher rarity tier than tiberium.
